title: Scyushi Vanilla Plus
description: Nifty vanilla enhancements and engine improvements. Created for Scyushi's Ronincraft SMP.
body:
Nifty vanilla enhancements and engine improvements, among other things.

Created for Scyushi's Ronincraft SMP.
Enjoy proximity voice chat and beautiful shaders, massively increasing the immersion of Minecraft with lots of QOL and vanity mods while still staying pretty vanilla.
